The Red Wings attack the city of Mysidia to steal their Water Crystal, and return to the Kingdom of Baron. When Cecil, Captain of the Red Wings, afterwards questions the king's motives, he is stripped of his rank and sent with Kain, his friend and Captain of the Dragoons, to deliver a ring to the Village of Mist. There, Kain and Cecil watch in horror as monsters burst forth from inside the ring and lay waste to the village. A young girl, Rydia, is the only survivor and summons a monster named Titan in anger. This monster causes an earthquake, separating Cecil and Kain. Cecil awakens afterward and takes the wounded Rydia to a nearby inn. Baron soldiers come for Rydia but Cecil defends her, and she joins him on his journey.

It is revealed that Rosa, Cecil's love interest, had followed him and is extremely ill with a fever. Soon after this, Cecil and Rydia meet Tellah, who is going to Damcyan Castle to retrieve his eloping daughter, Anna. However, Anna is killed when the Red Wings bomb the castle. Edward, Anna's lover and the prince of Damcyan, explains that the Red Wings' new commander, Golbez, did this to steal the Fire Crystal for Baron as they had stolen the Water Crystal from Mysidia. Tellah leaves the party to exact revenge on Golbez for Anna's death. After finding a cure for Rosa, the party decides to go to Fabul to protect the Wind Crystal. Here they meet Master Yang, a warrior monk serviced to the kingdom and the protection of the crystal. The Red Wings attack, and Kain reappears as one of Golbez's servants. He attacks and defeats Cecil; when Rosa intervenes, Golbez kidnaps her and Kain takes the crystal. On the way back to Baron, the party is attacked by Leviathan and separated.

title: THE FINALS
description:
GOT WHAT IT TAKES?   

Viewers at home, here's the news you've been waiting to hear: THE FINALS is accepting new contestants, and that means YOU! That's right, soon the world could be watching YOU tear apart our newest dynamic arenas and seize everlasting fame!
  
  As you know, THE FINALS is the world's greatest free-to-play combat game show! Our contestants plug in to our virtual world and join teams in escalating tournaments. They fight it out in our beautifully-rendered arenas based on real-world locations that they can alter, exploit, and even destroy.
  
  Sure, you can aim and shoot, but contestants that add our carefully curated virtual environments to their arsenal are more likely to advance, so do anything you can imagine in the name of victory! Burn arenas to the ground! Send wrecking balls crashing into your opponents! Don't just pull triggers - pull down buildings!
  
         THE WORLD IS WATCHING 

      THE FINALS thrives on spectacle, so drive your fans wild with thrilling combat and your own personal flair as you compete for worldwide fame and the support of our discerning and stylish sponsors. 
  
   Play Your Way  - Whether it’s sneaking up on enemy squads with a katana in hand or ripping an entire building out from under their feet with explosives, THE FINALS lets YOU make the call! With different skills across body builds and a wide array of weapons and gadgets, you'll have all the tools to make your playstyle your own!
  
   The World Is Your Weapon (And Enemy)  - A skilled contender might go in guns blazing, but with environmental destruction in your arsenal, that’s just the start of what you can wield against your foes! All of our arenas can be altered, used, or reduced to rubble - and not just by you.
  
   Your Rising Star  - Ready for your close-up? Standing out in THE FINALS means the eyes of the world will be upon you, so you’d better look your best! Gather fans and fame as you craft a unique avatar with the help of our generous sponsors and dazzling customization options!
  
   GET FAMOUS 

     This is the opportunity of a lifetime. Arenas based on iconic places, unparalleled destruction, and endless tactical possibilities await - make them your own, and the floodgates of fame will open. Your competition will have the same opportunities, so it’ll be up to you to be more clever and attention-grabbing. Are you up to the challenge? Are you the world’s next all-star?
  
   Can you reach THE FINALS?

localized_description.text:
你能登上巅峰吗？
 

 
在这里给大家带来了重磅消息！
 
 《THE FINALS》正在招募新的参赛者。
 
 没错，正是电视机前的各位！全世界将会关注即将在激烈的战场上为了争夺冠军而奋战的各位！
 

 
总所周知，《THE FINALS》是一个可免费参加的世界顶级竞技秀！
 
 
 
 参赛者将会进入到以全世界著名城市为背景而制作的虚拟竞技场，与队友展开每轮持续升温的淘汰赛。通过参赛者高超的实力以及战术揭破其他队伍的弱点，破坏竞技场，奔向冠军吧！保证每位参赛者都会体验到前所未有的快感与永恒的荣耀！
 

 
绝非一款平庸的射击游戏。
 
 在《THE FINALS》中每位参赛者都能自由破坏我们为各位精心准备的虚拟竞技场。
 
 为了胜利，尽情地发挥想象力去尝试所有的战略。
 
 为了胜利，将竞技场夷为平地，发射破坏球破坏敌人阵型！
 
 在这座竞技场里除了扣动扳机，尽可能利用战略以及可破坏的环境为胜利而战吧！
 

 
全世界正在关注你！
 

 
《THE FINALS》时刻充满精彩内容！为了得到赞助商的支持与荣耀而展开的战斗中展现独有的战斗风格，让全世界的粉丝陷入你的魅力吧。
 
打造属于你的战略 - 
 
 参赛者不仅能手持武士刀袭击敌方队伍， 也可以使用炸弹摧毁整栋大楼瞬间逆转战局。在《THE FINALS》中，每位参赛者在竞技场里都可以自由做出决定并行动。不同体型有不同的技能与武器可供选择，以便每位参赛者打造属于自己的独特战斗风格摧毁敌人！
 

 
掌控环境吧！否则会被环境而掌控 -
 
 
 
 好枪法可以帮你占有优势，但是灵活运用可破坏的环境会帮你主宰战场。可破坏的环境是可以对抗敌人的强力手段之一！它可以使你摧毁敌人并瞬间改变战势！
 
 
 
 请切记，不仅你可以利用环境，你的敌人也可以同样利用环境使你陷入危险。
 

 
能否成为新秀？ - 
 
 
 
 准备好成为新秀了吗？在《THE FINALS》里赞助商会帮你变得更加华丽，通过赞助商提供的个性十足的定制化装扮，赢得全世界粉丝们的关注和名声吧！
 

 
变得更有名吧！
 

 
这是一生难逢的机会！以现实世界中的著名城市为背景的虚拟竞技场，无限的环境破坏和无尽的战略等待着参赛者。
 
 
 
 通过使用所有手段尽情享受无尽的名誉吧。不要放松警惕，你的敌人们也同样有机会登上巅峰。以更加独特且巧妙的方法战胜你的敌人吧。做好成为下一个新秀的准备了吗？

你能登上巔峰嗎？
 
"重磅消息来了！
 
 《THE FINALS》正在招募新的參賽者。
 
 沒錯，正是電視機前的各位！全世界將會關註即將在激烈的戰場上為了爭奪冠軍而奮戰的各位！"
 
"總所周知，《THE FINALS》是一個可免費參加的世界頂級競技秀！
 
 
 
 參賽者將會進入到以全世界著名城市為背景而製作的虛擬競技場，與隊友展開每輪持續升溫的淘汰賽。通過參賽者高超的實力以及戰術揭破其他隊伍的弱點，破壞競技場，奔向冠軍吧！保證每位參賽者都會體驗到前所未有的快感與永恒的榮耀！"
 
"絕非一款平庸的射擊遊戲。
 
 在《THE FINALS》中每位參賽者都能自由破壞我們為各位精心準備的虛擬競技場。
 
 為了勝利，盡情地發揮想象力去嘗試所有的戰略。
 
 為了勝利，將競技場夷為平地，發射破壞球破壞敵人陣型！
 
 在這座競技場裏除了扣動扳機，盡可能利用戰略以及可破壞的環境為勝利而戰吧！"
 
全世界正在關註你！
 
《THE FINALS》時刻充滿精彩內容！為了得到贊助商的支持與榮耀而展開的戰鬥中展現獨有的戰鬥風格，讓全世界的粉絲陷入你的魅力吧。
 
"打造屬於你的戰略 - 
 
 參賽者不僅能手持武士刀襲擊敵方隊伍， 也可以使用炸彈摧毀整棟大樓瞬間逆轉戰局。在《THE FINALS》中，每位參賽者在競技場裏都可以自由做出決定並行動。不同體型有不同的技能與武器可供選擇，以便每位參賽者打造屬於自己的獨特戰鬥風格摧毀敵人！"
 
"掌控環境吧！否則會被環境而掌控 -
 
 
 
 好槍法可以幫你占有優勢，但是靈活運用可破壞的環境會幫你主宰戰場。可破壞的環境是可以對抗敵人的強力手段之一！它可以使你摧毀敵人並瞬間改變戰勢！
 
 
 
 請切記，不僅你可以利用環境，你的敵人也可以同樣利用環境使你陷入危險。"
 
"能否成為新秀？ - 
 
 
 
 準備好成為新秀了嗎？在《THE FINALS》裏贊助商會幫你變得更加華麗，通過贊助商提供的個性十足的定製化裝扮，贏得全世界粉絲們的關註和名聲吧！"
 
變得更有名吧！
 
"這是一生難逢的機會！以現實世界中的著名城市為背景的虛擬競技場，無限的環境破壞和無盡的戰略等待著參賽者。
 
 
 
 通過使用所有手段盡情享受無盡的名譽吧。不要放松警惕，你的敵人們也同樣有機會登上巔峰。以更加獨特且巧妙的方法戰勝你的敵人吧。做好成為下一個新秀的準備了嗎？"
 
Can you reach THE FINALS?

GOT WHAT IT TAKES?   

Viewers at home, here's the news you've been waiting to hear: THE FINALS is accepting new contestants, and that means YOU! That's right, soon the world could be watching YOU tear apart our newest dynamic arenas and seize everlasting fame!
  
  As you know, THE FINALS is the world's greatest free-to-play combat game show! Our contestants plug in to our virtual world and join teams in escalating tournaments. They fight it out in our beautifully-rendered arenas based on real-world locations that they can alter, exploit, and even destroy.
  
  Sure, you can aim and shoot, but contestants that add our carefully curated virtual environments to their arsenal are more likely to advance, so do anything you can imagine in the name of victory! Burn arenas to the ground! Send wrecking balls crashing into your opponents! Don't just pull triggers - pull down buildings!
  
         THE WORLD IS WATCHING 

      THE FINALS thrives on spectacle, so drive your fans wild with thrilling combat and your own personal flair as you compete for worldwide fame and the support of our discerning and stylish sponsors. 
  
   Play Your Way  - Whether it’s sneaking up on enemy squads with a katana in hand or ripping an entire building out from under their feet with explosives, THE FINALS lets YOU make the call! With different skills across body builds and a wide array of weapons and gadgets, you'll have all the tools to make your playstyle your own!
  
   The World Is Your Weapon (And Enemy)  - A skilled contender might go in guns blazing, but with environmental destruction in your arsenal, that’s just the start of what you can wield against your foes! All of our arenas can be altered, used, or reduced to rubble - and not just by you.
  
   Your Rising Star  - Ready for your close-up? Standing out in THE FINALS means the eyes of the world will be upon you, so you’d better look your best! Gather fans and fame as you craft a unique avatar with the help of our generous sponsors and dazzling customization options!
  
   GET FAMOUS 

     This is the opportunity of a lifetime. Arenas based on iconic places, unparalleled destruction, and endless tactical possibilities await - make them your own, and the floodgates of fame will open. Your competition will have the same opportunities, so it’ll be up to you to be more clever and attention-grabbing. Are you up to the challenge? Are you the world’s next all-star?
  
   Can you reach THE FINALS?

¿TIENES LO QUE HACE FALTA? 

 Espectadores, os traemos una gran noticia: ¡THE FINALS busca nuevos participantes y podríais ser VOSOTROS! Lo que estáis oyendo, ¡pronto, el mundo os verá destrozar nuestras arenas dinámicas y conseguir la fama eterna!
 
 Como sabes, THE FINALS es el mejor espectáculo de combate de juego gratuito del mundo. Los participantes entran en nuestro mundo virtual para disputar torneos en equipo de dificultad en aumento. Se enfrentan en arenas basadas en lugares reales que pueden modificar, aprovechar e incluso destruir.
 
 Claro que puedes liarte a tiros, pero si añades a tu arsenal nuestros entornos virtuales, tendrás más probabilidades de avanzar, ¡así que haz cualquier lo que se te ocurra para ganar! ¡Quema las arenas! ¡Manda bolas de demolición a tus rivales! No solo aprietes el gatillo: ¡derriba edificios!
       
  EL MUNDO TE ESTÁ MIRANDO 

 THE FINALS se nutre del espectáculo, así que vuelve locos a tus admiradores con un combate emocionante y añade tu toque personal mientras compites por la fama y el apoyo de nuestros exigentes patrocinadores.
 
 Juega como quieras: ya sea sorprendiendo a los escuadrones enemigos katana en mano o derribando un edificio entero bajo sus pies con explosivos; ¡en THE FINALS TÚ decides! Con habilidades según las complexiones y un amplio repertorio de armas y artilugios, ¡podrás crear tu propio estilo de juego!
 
 El mundo es tu arma (y tu enemigo): puedes hacer que lluevan las balas, pero con la destrucción del entorno en tu arsenal, ¡imagínate todo lo que puedes usar contra tus rivales! Todas nuestras arenas se pueden modificar, utilizar o reducir a escombros, pero no solo puedes hacerlo tú.
 
 Nueva promesa: ¿te asustan los primeros planos? Si destacas en THE FINALS, el mundo entero tendrá los ojos puestos en ti, ¡así que será mejor que luzcas tus mejores galas! Consigue admiradores y fama mientras creas un avatar con la ayuda de nuestros generosos patrocinadores y opciones de personalización alucinantes.
 
  ALCANZA LA FAMA 
 
 Esta oportunidad solo se presenta una vez en la vida. Arenas basadas en lugares míticos, destrucción sin parangón y un sinfín de posibilidades tácticas te aguardan: hazlas tuyas y las puertas de la fama se abrirán para ti. Tus rivales tendrán las mismas oportunidades, así que supéralos en astucia y presta atención. ¿Aceptas el desafío? ¿Serás la próxima estrella indiscutible en el mundo entero?
 
 
  ¿Podrás llegar a THE FINALS?

SEREZ-VOUS À LA HAUTEUR ? 
 
 Chers téléspectateurs, vous l'attendiez : THE FINALS accepte de nouveaux concurrents, autrement dit, VOUS ! Eh oui ! Bientôt, le monde pourrait VOUS regarder démonter nos dernières arènes dynamiques et connaître la gloire éternelle !
 
 Comme vous le savez, THE FINALS est le plus grand jeu de combat au monde ! Nos concurrents se connectent à notre monde virtuel et rejoignent des équipes dans des tournois palpitants, s'affrontant dans nos sublimes arènes inspirées de lieux réels qu'ils peuvent modifier, exploiter et même détruire.
 
 Bien sûr, vous pouvez juste viser et tirer, mais ceux qui ajoutent à leur arsenal nos environnements soigneusement conçus ont plus de chances de progresser. Alors faites tout pour gagner ! Rasez les arènes ! Dégommez vos adversaires à coup de boulets ! N'abattez pas qu'une pluie de balles sur vos ennemis, abattez des bâtiments ! 
       
  LE MONDE VOUS REGARDE 
 
 THE FINALS mise sur le spectacle, alors régalez vos fans de combats captivants et de votre style personnel en luttant pour la renommée mondiale et le soutien de nos éminents sponsors.
 
 Jouez à votre façon : que vous approchiez furtivement les escouades ennemies un katana en main, ou que vous fassiez sauter tout un bâtiment, dans THE FINALS, c'est VOUS qui choisissez ! Avec des compétences variées et un large éventail d'armes et de gadgets, vous aurez tous les outils pour définir votre style de jeu !
 
 Le monde est votre arme (et votre ennemi) : un concurrent aguerri peut mettre le monde à feu et à sang, mais vous avez encore mieux dans votre arsenal : la destruction environnementale ! Toutes nos arènes peuvent être altérées, utilisées ou ravagées... et pas uniquement par vous.
 
 Étoile montante : prêt pour votre gros plan ? Comme toute vraie star de THE FINALS, montrez-vous sous votre meilleur jour ! Rassemblez des fans et gagnez en notoriété avec un avatar unique, grâce à nos généreux sponsors et nos vastes options de personnalisation !
 
  DEVENEZ CÉLÈBRE 

 C'est la chance de votre vie. Des arènes inspirées de lieux emblématiques, une destruction inégalée et des possibilités tactiques infinies vous attendent. À vous de les maîtriser pour que les portes de la célébrité s'ouvrent à vous. Vos adversaires bénéficieront des mêmes opportunités, alors à vous de faire preuve de plus d'ingéniosité. Serez-vous à la hauteur ? Serez-vous la prochaine superstar mondiale ?
 
  Saurez-vous tirer votre épingle du jeu dans THE FINALS ?

HAST DU DAS ZEUG DAZU? 

 An all unsere Zuschauer: Hier sind die lang erwarteten Neuigkeiten: THE FINALS nimmt neue Kandidaten an, und das heißt: DICH! Ganz genau: Bald wird die Welt zusehen, wie DU unsere neuesten dynamischen Arenen auseinandernimmst und ewigen Ruhm erlangst!
 
 Wie du weißt, ist THE FINALS die größte kostenlose Kampfspielshow der Welt. Die Kandidaten schalten sich in unsere virtuelle Welt ein und kämpfen in Teams in eskalierenden Turnieren. Sie kämpfen in unseren fantastisch gerenderten, an echte Stätten angelehnten Arenen, die sie ändern, ausnutzen und sogar zerstören können.
 
 Natürlich kannst du zielen und schießen, aber Kandidaten, die unsere sorgfältig betreuten virtuellen Umgebungen in ihr Arsenal aufnehmen, haben höhere Erfolgschancen. Also tue alles, was du dir nur vorstellen kannst, um zu siegen! Wirf Abrissbirnen auf deine Gegner! Drück nicht nur den Abzug durch, sondern reiß ganze Gebäude ein!
       
  DIE WELT SIEHT ZU 
 
 THE FINALS lebt vom großen Spektakel, also bring deine Fans mit aufregenden Kampfszenen und deinem persönlichen Flair zum Toben, während du nach Weltruhm und Unterstützung durch unsere anspruchsvollen, edlen Sponsoren strebst.
 
 Spiel dein Spiel: Schleich dich mit dem Katana in der Hand an gegnerische Trupps an oder spreng ihnen ganze Gebäude unter den Füßen weg! Bei THE FINALS bestimmst DU! Mit unterschiedlichen Fertigkeiten, verschiedenen Builds und einer großen Auswahl an Waffen und Geräten hast du alles an der Hand, was du für deinen persönlichen Spielstil brauchst!
 
 Die Welt ist deine Waffe (und dein Feind): Ein geübter Kandidat könnte mit rauchenden Pistolen hereinstürmen, aber mit Umgebungszerstörung im Arsenal ist das nur der Anfang deiner Angriffe! Alle unsere Arenen können verändert, benutzt oder zertrümmert werden – und nicht nur von dir.
 
 Dein aufsteigender Stern: Bereit für deine Nahaufnahme? Erfolg bei THE FINALS zieht die Augen der Welt auf dich, also siehst du besser auch entsprechend gut aus! Sammle Fans und Ruhm und schaffe dir mithilfe großzügiger Sponsoren und irren Gestaltungsoptionen einen einzigartigen Avatar! 
 
  WERDE BERÜHMT 
 
 Das ist die Chance deines Lebens! An berühmte Stätten angelehnte Arenen, unvergleichliche Zerstörung und grenzenlose taktische Möglichkeiten warten auf dich: Nutze sie und du wirst mit Ruhm überhäuft. Die Konkurrenz hat dieselben Möglichkeiten, also musst du cleverer und auffälliger spielen. Traust du dich? Bist du der nächste Weltstar?
 
  Kannst du THE FINALS erreichen?

勝ち上がる準備は出来た？ 
 
 ご自宅からご視聴の皆さんにお待ちかねのニュース。THE FINALSが新たな出場者を受け入れる。そう、君のことだ！ 世界は間もなく、君が最新のダイナミックなアリーナを引っかき回し、永遠の栄光を勝ち取るのを目の当たりにするだろう。
 
 ご存じのように、THE FINALSは世界最高の基本プレイ無料の戦闘ゲームショーだ！ 出場者はゲームのバーチャル世界にプラグインし、チームに参加してトーナメントを進めていく。戦いが繰り広げられるアリーナは現実世界のロケーションが美しく再現されており、手を加えたり、戦略的に利用したり、破壊することだって可能だ。
 
 もちろん、狙って撃つだけでもかまわないが、この超リアルなバーチャル環境をも武器とするプレイヤーは、もっと優位に立てるだろう。だから勝利の名のもとに、考えられることを何でもやれ！ アリーナを焼き尽くせ！ 対戦者に解体用鉄球をぶちかませ！ 引き金を引くだけじゃ不十分。建物をなぎ倒すんだ！
 
       
  世界が見ている 
 THE FINALSの魅力は、その壮大さだ。スリル満点の戦闘と自分だけのセンスでファンを熱狂させよう。世界レベルの名声と、目の肥えたスタイリッシュなスポンサーたちの支持を求めて競い合え。
 
 プレイは自分流で - 刀を手に敵部隊へ忍び寄るもよし、爆発物で敵のいる建物を丸ごと吹っ飛ばすもよし。THE FINALSのルールは君が決めろ！ 体格に応じた多彩なスキルと、幅広い武器やガジェットで、どんなプレイスタイルも思いのまま！
 
 ステージは武器であり、敵でもある - 熟練のプレイヤーなら銃撃戦に自信があるかもしれない。だが建物の破壊など環境を武器にできるのなら、銃撃戦は敵に対する攻撃手段としては初歩に過ぎない！ すべてのアリーナは手を加えたり、戦略的に利用したり、はたまた粉々に破壊することさえ可能。もちろん全員が、だ。
 
 期待の新星は君だ - クローズアップされる準備はいいか？ THE FINALSで目立つということは、世界中の視線が君に注がれるということだ。だから最高の自分を見せろ！ 太っ腹なスポンサーたちと魅力的なカスタマイズオプションの助けを借り、独自のアバターを作ってファンと名声を獲得しよう。
 
  有名になろう 
 これは一生に一度のチャンスだ。有名な場所をモデルとしたアリーナ、超過激な破壊、無限にある戦略の可能性 - これらを自分のものにしたとき、名声への門が開かれる。ライバルにも同じ機会が与えられているから、より鮮やかな立ち回りで注目を集められるかどうかは君にかかっている。挑戦を受けて立つ気はあるか？ 君は次の世界オールスターとなれるか！？
 
  最後まで勝ち抜けるか？

AVETE LA STOFFA? 
 
 Telespettatori, la notizia è arrivata: THE FINALS accetta concorrenti... cioè VOI! Esatto, presto il mondo potrebbe guardarvi fare a pezzi le nostre nuove arene dinamiche e conquistare la gloria!
 
 Come sapete, THE FINALS è il più grande gioco televisivo free-to-play per combattenti al mondo! I concorrenti si collegano al mondo virtuale e fanno squadra in tornei sempre più impegnativi. Combattono in arene impeccabili basate su luoghi reali, che possono alterare, sfruttare o distruggere.
 
 Certo, potete limitarvi a sparare, ma i concorrenti che fanno dei curatissimi ambienti virtuali la propria arma hanno più probabilità di avanzare, quindi fate tutto ciò che potete immaginare in nome della vittoria, radete al suolo le arene, fate schiantare palle da demolizione contro gli avversari! Perché sparare e basta, quando potete abbattere interi edifici?
       
  IL MONDO VI GUARDA 
 
 THE FINALS vive di spettacolo, quindi fate impazzire i fan con combattimenti emozionanti, mentre inseguite la fama mondiale e il sostegno dei nostri esigenti sponsor.
 
 Giocate a modo vostro: che si tratti di avvicinarsi di soppiatto alle squadre nemiche con una katana in mano o di far saltare in aria l'edificio in cui si nascondono, THE FINALS lascia che siate VOI a decidere! Grazie alle varie abilità, alle diverse corporature e a una serie di armi e gadget, avrete tutti gli strumenti per personalizzare il vostro stile di gioco!
 
 Il mondo è un'arma (e un nemico): sì, potete entrare ad armi spianate, forti delle vostre abilità, ma se aggiungete la distruzione ambientale al vostro arsenale, le normali armi sono banali rispetto a ciò che potete usare contro i nemici! Ogni arena può essere modificata, sfruttata o ridotta in macerie, e non solo da voi.
 
 Stelle nascenti: pronti per il primo piano? Distinguersi in THE FINALS significa avere gli occhi del mondo puntati, quindi curate il vostro aspetto! Createvi una base di fan e aumentate la vostra fama grazie a un avatar unico, ideato con l'aiuto dei nostri generosi sponsor e delle straordinarie opzioni di personalizzazione!
 
  DIVENTATE FAMOSI 
 
 È la vostra occasione. Vi aspettano arene basate su luoghi iconici, distruzione senza precedenti e infinite possibilità tattiche: fatele vostre e percorrete il sentiero della fama. La concorrenza avrà gli stessi strumenti, quindi usateli con più intelligenza e siate più interessanti. Ve la sentite di raccogliere la sfida? Chi sarà la prossima star di fama mondiale?
 
  Dove arriverete in THE FINALS?

brief:
GOT WHAT IT TAKES?   

Viewers at home, here's the news you've been waiting to hear: THE FINALS is accepting new contestants, and that means YOU! That's right, soon the world could be watching YOU tear apart our newest dynamic arenas and seize everlasting fame!
  
  As you know, THE FINALS is the world's greatest free-to-play combat game show! Our contestants plug in to our virtual world and join teams in escalating tournaments. They fight it out in our beautifully-rendered arenas based on real-world locations that they can alter, exploit, and even destroy.
  
  Sure, you can aim and shoot, but contestants that add our carefully curated virtual environments to their arsenal are more likely to advance, so do anything you can imagine in the name of victory! Burn arenas to the ground! Send wrecking balls crashing into your opponents! Don't just pull triggers - pull down buildings!
  
         THE WORLD IS WATCHING 

      THE FINALS thrives on spectacle, so drive your fans wild with thrilling combat and your own personal flair as you compete for worldwide fame and the support of our discerning and stylish sponsors. 
  
   Play Your Way  - Whether it’s sneaking up on enemy squads with a katana in hand or ripping an entire building out from under their feet with explosives, THE FINALS lets YOU make the call! With different skills across body builds and a wide array of weapons and gadgets, you'll have all the tools to make your playstyle your own!
  
   The World Is Your Weapon (And Enemy)  - A skilled contender might go in guns blazing, but with environmental destruction in your arsenal, that’s just the start of what you can wield against your foes! All of our arenas can be altered, used, or reduced to rubble - and not just by you.
  
   Your Rising Star  - Ready for your close-up? Standing out in THE FINALS means the eyes of the world will be upon you, so you’d better look your best! Gather fans and fame as you craft a unique avatar with the help of our generous sponsors and dazzling customization options!
  
   GET FAMOUS 

     This is the opportunity of a lifetime. Arenas based on iconic places, unparalleled destruction, and endless tactical possibilities await - make them your own, and the floodgates of fame will open. Your competition will have the same opportunities, so it’ll be up to you to be more clever and attention-grabbing. Are you up to the challenge? Are you the world’s next all-star?
  
   Can you reach THE FINALS?

title: Mortal Kombat 1
description:
It’s In Our Blood!  Discover a reborn Mortal Kombat™ Universe created by the Fire God Liu Kang. 
      New Origins  Reflecting Fire God Liu Kang’s vision of perfection, Mortal Kombat 1’s brand new universe is familiar, yet radically altered.
         Invasions  Invasions is a dynamic single player campaign with a variety of distinct challenges. With built in progression and RPG mechanics, mixed with MK1’s incredible fighting action, Invasions provides deep, and engaging challenges, and a ton of rewards along the way.
         Kameos  Kameos dramatically enhance every fight, assisting teammates with their own Special Moves, Throws and defensive Breakers.

localized_description.text:
我们生来如此！  探索由火神刘康打造，并重生后的“真人快打™”宇宙。 
      全新起源  映射了火神刘康所追求的完美愿景，《真人快打 1》带来的全新宇宙让人既熟悉又颠覆认知。
         入侵  “入侵”是一部动态变换的单人战役，具有各种不同的挑战。拥有独立进度与角色扮演机制，并与《真人快打 1》的炫酷战斗相结合，“入侵”将提供颇具深度且引人入胜的挑战，并将随着挑战提供丰厚的奖励。
         客串  “客串”的引入将极大增强战斗体验，用客串角色独有的特殊招式、投掷和防御中断技来协助队友。

我們生來如此！  探索由火神劉康打造的重生「真人快打™」宇宙。 
      全新起源  《真人快打 1》的全新宇宙既令人熟悉又徹底顛覆，反映出火神劉康的完美願景。
         入侵  入侵是一種動態的單人戰役，具有各種不同的挑戰。搭配內建的進度與 RPG 機制，與《真人快打 1》令人驚豔的戰鬥動作結合，「入侵」提供深入且引人入勝的挑戰，並一路提供豐富獎勵。
         客串  客串鬥士可明顯強化每一次對戰，幫助隊友使出特殊招式、投擲以及防禦中斷技。

It’s In Our Blood!  Discover a reborn Mortal Kombat™ Universe created by the Fire God Liu Kang. 
      New Origins  Reflecting Fire God Liu Kang’s vision of perfection, Mortal Kombat 1’s brand new universe is familiar, yet radically altered.
         Invasions  Invasions is a dynamic single player campaign with a variety of distinct challenges. With built in progression and RPG mechanics, mixed with MK1’s incredible fighting action, Invasions provides deep, and engaging challenges, and a ton of rewards along the way.
         Kameos  Kameos dramatically enhance every fight, assisting teammates with their own Special Moves, Throws and defensive Breakers.

¡Lo llevamos en la sangre!  Descubre un nuevo universo de Mortal Kombat™ creado por Liu Kang, Dios del Fuego. 
      Nuevos orígenes  El nuevo universo de Mortal Kombat 1, reflejo de la visión que tiene Liu Kang, Dios del Fuego, de la perfección, resulta familiar, pero, al mismo tiempo, está radicalmente alterado.
         Invasiones  Invasiones es un modo Campaña dinámico para un jugador que presenta diversos desafíos especiales. Dispone de la misma mecánica y forma de crear progreso que los juegos de rol combinadas con la emocionante acción de los kombates de MK1. En Invasiones, puedes afrontar desafíos intensos y divertidos y recibir abundantes recompensas a lo largo de la aventura.
         Kameos  Los kombatientes kameo llevan el kombate a otro nivel y cooperan interviniendo en los movimientos especiales, los lanzamientos y los rompekombos defensivos del personaje principal.

C'est dans notre sang !  Découvrez un univers de Mortal Kombat™ totalement recrée par le dieu du feu Liu Kang. 
      Nouvelles origines  Le tout nouvel univers de Mortal Kombat 1 est radicalement modifié, mais reste familier. Il reflète la vision de perfection de Liu Kang, dieu du feu.
         Invasions  Le mode Invasions désigne une campagne en solo avec toute une série de défis divers et variés. Le mode Invasions propose aussi une progression et des mécanismes de RPG intégrés, mélangés à l'incroyable action de combat de MK1, des défis profonds et captivants, ainsi qu'une tonne de récompenses en cours de route.
         Kaméos  Les kaméos améliorent considérablement chaque kombat, et aident les coéquipiers avec leurs propres coups spéciaux, offensifs et défensif.

Es liegt uns im Blut!  Entdecke ein wiedergeborenes Mortal Kombat-Universum, erschaffen vom Feuergott Liu Kang. 
      Neue Ursprünge  Das brandneue Universum von Mortal Kombat 1 zeigt Feuergott Liu Kangs Version von Perfektion auf eine familiäre und doch radikal andere Weise.
         Invasionen  Invasionen ist eine dynamische Kampagne für Einzelspieler:innen, mit einer Reihe an individuellen Herausforderungen. Mit eingebautem Fortschritt und RPG-Mechaniken, gemischt mit der unglaublichen Kampf-Action von MK1, bieten Invasionen tiefe und fesselnde Herausforderungen mit unglaublich vielen Belohnungen.
         Kameos  Kameos verbessern jeden Kampf dramatisch und unterstützen Teammitglieder mit ihren eigenen Spezialaktionen, Würfen und verteidigenden Brechern.

Está no nosso sangue!  Descobre um Universo de Mortal Kombat™ renascido criado pelo Liu Kang Deus do Fogo. 
      Novas Origens  Ilustrando a visão perfeita de Liu Kang Deus do Fogo, o novo universo de Mortal Kombat 1 é familiar, mas ao mesmo tempo radicalmente diferente.
         Invasões  Invasões é uma campanha dinâmica para um jogador que apresenta uma variedade de diferentes desafios. Inclui uma progressão incorporada e mecânicas de RPG que se combinam com a incrível ação de MK1. Invasões dá-te desafios complexos e envolventes, além de muitas recompensas.
         Kameos  Os Kameos melhoram todas as lutas em vários aspetos ao dar apoio a lutadores da equipa com os seus movimentos especiais, empurrões e golpes defensivos.

その血は受け継がれる！  火の神リュウ・カンによって創造され、生まれ変わったモータルコンバット™の世界を見つけ出せ。 
      新たな起源  火の神リュウ・カンの完璧な構想が反映した『モータルコンバット１』の真新しい世界は、馴染みがあるが、根本的に全く新しい異世界だ。
         侵略  侵略は、さまざまな独特なチャレンジが伴うダイナミックなシングルプレイヤーキャンペーンだ。展開型RPGメカニズムとMK1の驚愕な戦闘アクションが結合した侵略は、より深く魅力的なチャレンジと、その過程で大量の報酬をもたらしてくれる。
         カメオ  カメオは、あらゆる戦闘を劇的に強化し、独自の必殺技、投げ技、防御を破壊することでチームメイトを支援する。

It’s In Our Blood!  Discover a reborn Mortal Kombat™ Universe created by the Fire God Liu Kang. 
      New Origins  Reflecting Fire God Liu Kang’s vision of perfection, Mortal Kombat 1’s brand new universe is familiar, yet radically altered.
         Invasions  Invasions is a dynamic single player campaign with a variety of distinct challenges. With built in progression and RPG mechanics, mixed with MK1’s incredible fighting action, Invasions provides deep, and engaging challenges, and a ton of rewards along the way.
         Kameos  Kameos dramatically enhance every fight, assisting teammates with their own Special Moves, Throws and defensive Breakers.

Vi har det i blodet!  Opdag et genfødt Mortal Kombat™-univers, der er skabt af ildguden Liu Kang. 
      Nye oprindelser  For at afspejle Ildguden Liu Kangs vision om perfektion er Mortal Kombat 1s helt nye univers velkendt men alligevel radikalt anderledes.
         Invasions  Invasions er en dynamisk singleplayer-kampagne med en række forskellige udfordringer. Med indbygget progression og RPG-mekanikker blandet med MK1’s fantastiske kamphandling byder Invasions på dybe og engagerende udfordringer med masser af belønninger på vejen.
         Kameos  Kameos forstærker drastisk hver kamp og hjælper holdkammerater med deres egne speciellle træk, kast og defensive manøvrer.

Ce l’abbiamo nel sangue!  Scopri un universo di Mortal Kombat™ del tutto rivoluzionato, creato dal Dio del fuoco Liu Kang. 
      Nuove origini  Rispettando la visione di perfezione del Dio del fuoco Liu Kang, Mortal Kombat 1 presenta un universo familiare e allo stesso tempo radicalmente diverso.
         Invasioni  Le Invasioni sono una campagna per giocatore singolo con una varietà distinta di sfide. Con una meccanica RPG e di progressione inclusa e le azioni di kombattimento incredibili di MK1, le Invasioni ti garantiscono sfide pronfonde e coinvolgenti e un sacco di ricompense da riscuotere.
         Kameo  I kameo migliorano sensibilmente ogni kombattimento, assistendo i compagni di squadra con mosse speciali, lanci e breaker difensivi.

title: Easy Delivery Co.
description:
Easy Delivery Co. is a relaxing driving game, with definitely no secrets. You’ve been hired as a delivery driver in a once-lively scenic mountain town now plagued with inhospitable weather. Make deliveries and uncover the story of the town’s  not-at-all mysterious residents, all while earning well below minimum wage.
  
 Pick Up         
   Drive         
   Deliver         
   Explore     
 
  Features    

 Earn a "living" by delivering packages with your kei truck
    
Take in the atmospheric scenery or blitz through (road safety not required)

    Buy drastically overpriced gas and get to know the locals

    Simple controls and retro graphics

    Listen to cool beats while driving

    Nothing strange going on, no lore, nothing at all, we promise

localized_description.text:
Join the community      
 
 
  关于游戏  《黑猫速递》是一款纯粹的休闲驾驶游戏，绝对没有秘密。曾经繁华的山村如今被恶劣天气影响，你是新来的快递司机，将通过送货，逐步揭开镇上完全不神秘的普通居民背后的故事，而你的劳动则远远低于法定最低标准。
   揽收         
   开车         
   送货

  • 可以醉心氛围美景，也可以无视交规疾驰（无所谓安全驾驶）
  • 购买价格离谱的汽油，了解本地居民
  • 操作简易，画面复古
  • 驾驶途中收听炫酷音乐
  • 一切正常，没有世界观设定，没有背景故事，保证没有

Easy Delivery Co. es un juego apacible de conducción sin secretos. Ni uno. Te han contratado para hacer entregas en un pintoresco pueblo de montaña que supo ser activo pero ahora lo azota un clima inhóspito. Completa entregas y descubre la historia de los residentes para nada misteriosos. Todo esto sin siquiera cobrar el salario mínimo.

   Recoge         
   Conduce         
   Entrega         
   Explora   
   
Características    

 Entrega paquetes con tu pequeño camión a cambio de (poco) dinero.

    Disfruta del paisaje o conduce a toda velocidad sin respetar una sola señal de tránsito.

    Compra combustible ridículamente caro y conoce a los residentes.

    Juega con controles sencillos y gráficos retro.

    Escucha unos buenos temas mientras conduces.

    No pasa nada raro; no hay trama ni nada. Te lo juramos.

Easy Delivery Co. est un jeu de conduite relaxant qui ne cache aucun secret. Vous venez d’obtenir le poste de livreur dans une ville de montagne charmante, autrefois très vivante et maintenant condamnée à un hiver éternel. Effectuez des livraisons et découvrez des habitants en aucun cas mystérieux, tout ça pour une paie en dessous du salaire minimum.

   Récupérez les colis         
   Roulez         
   Livrez         
   Explorez        
  
   Fonctionnalités     

Gagnez votre « vie » en livrant des colis dans votre mini-pickup.

    Admirez les paysages pittoresques sur la route, ou foncez (la sécurité routière n’est pas nécessaire).

    Achetez de l’essence à des prix aberrants et faites connaissance avec les habitants.

    Des contrôles simples et des graphismes rétro.

    Écoutez des musiques sympas sur la route.

    Il ne se passe rien d’étrange. Il n’y a aucune histoire ni aucun mystère. Promis.

Easy Delivery Co. ist ein entspanntes Fahrspiel, das definitiv keine Geheimnisse verbirgt. Du wurdest als Lieferfahrer in einer einst lebhaften Bergstadt eingestellt, die jetzt von menschenfeindlichem Wetter heimgesucht wird. Stelle Lieferungen zu und entdecke die Geschichte der kein bisschen mysteriösen Bewohnenden, während du weit unter dem Mindestlohn verdienst.

   Abholen         
   Fahren         
   Ausliefern         
   Erkunde       
   
Merkmale     

Verdiene deinen „Lebensunterhalt“, indem du Pakete mit deinem Kei-Truck auslieferst

    Genieße die atmosphärische Landschaft oder rase einfach hindurch (Verkehrsvorschriften dürfen dir egal sein)

    Kaufe immens überteuertes Benzin und lerne die Leute vor Ort kennen

    Einfache Steuerung und Retro-Grafik

    Höre coole Beats beim Fahren

    Hier geht nichts Seltsames vor sich, keine Hintergrundgeschichte, rein gar nichts, versprochen

ゲームについて  『Easy Delivery Co.』は、一切秘密なんてない のんびりドライブゲームです。かつて活気に満ちていた美しい山間の町で配達ドライバーとして雇われたものの、過酷な天候が悩みの種です。配達をこなしながら、何も変なところはない 住人たちの物語を明らかにしましょう。なお、最低賃金にはまるで届きません。
   集荷する         
   運転する         
   配達する         
    ██████の██に迫る         
   本作の特徴     軽トラックで配達して「生活費」を稼ごう
    雰囲気たっぷりの風景を楽しむもよし、突っ走るもよし（安全運転は不要）
    あまりにも高すぎるガソリンを入れて、住民たちと仲良くなろう
    シンプルな操作とレトロなグラフィック
    クールな音楽を聴きながらドライブ
    おかしなことなんて何もありません、本当に本当です

title: Final Fantasy III
description:
The original Final Fantasy III comes to life with completely new graphics and audio! A remodeled 2D take on the third game in the world-renowned Final Fantasy series! Enjoy the timeless story told through charming retro graphics.

An earthquake opens up a previously hidden cavern in Altar Cave near the village of Ur on the floating continent. Four young orphans under the care of Topapa, the village elder, explore the earthquake's impact and come across a crystal of light. The crystal grants them a portion of its power, and instructs them to go forth and restore balance to the world. Not knowing what to make of the crystal's pronouncements, but nonetheless recognizing the importance of its words, the four inform their adoptive family of their mission and set out to explore an overworld outside the area in which they were brought up, in order to bring balance back to the world.

Their adventures lead them to discover that there lies a whole world beyond the boundaries of the floating continent upon which they were living. In the world below, they discover a warlock named Xande, one of three apprentices to the legendary Archmage Noah, is trying to possess the crystals of light, so as to bring forth chaos and disorder. The four warriors eventually arrive at the Crystal Tower where they discover that the Cloud of Darkness is the source of the recent events. The Cloud attempts to create a similar situation to the Flood of Light a millennium earlier so that the world is pulled into the void. The Light Warriors traverse into the domain of the dark crystals to free the imprisoned Dark Warriors and defeat the Cloud of Darkness, thereby restoring the crystals and balance to the world. In the DS remake, there are several "side quests" that can also be completed.

title: Shantae and the Pirate's Curse
description:
Embark on a brand new adventure with Shantae, the hair-whipping belly dancing genie. When she loses her magic, Shantae must team up with her nemesis, the nefarious pirate Risky Boots in order to save Sequin Land from an evil curse. As a pirate, Shantae gains new weapons to advance her quest, slay monsters, battle epic bosses…and hopefully get her magic back in the bargain! But can she really trust her deadliest enemy?

The third Shantae game is the biggest yet! Beyond Sequin Land lie cursed islands and labyrinths each hiding a new piece of Pirate Gear - Flintlock Pistol, Pirate Hat, Scimitar, Risky's Boots, and even a Cannon. Upgrade Shantae's hair and weapons or unlock advanced Fighter's Moves. Locate maps, return lost Heart Squids, collect rare loot, and laugh out loud at the weird, wild, and wonderfully humorous cast of characters. Incredible stereoscopic visuals, unlockable Pirate-Mode, multiple endings, and an unforgettable soundtrack make this one game you won't want to miss!

Incredible stereoscopic visuals, unlockable Pirate-Mode, multiple endings, and an unforgettable soundtrack make this one game you won't want to miss!

brief:
Embark on a brand new adventure with Shantae, the hair-whipping belly dancing genie. When she loses her magic, Shantae must team up with her nemesis, the nefarious pirate Risky Boots in order to save Sequin Land from an evil curse. As a pirate, Shantae gains new weapons to advance her quest, slay monsters, battle epic bosses…and hopefully get her magic back in the bargain! But can she really trust her deadliest enemy?

The third Shantae game is the biggest yet! Beyond Sequin Land lie cursed islands and labyrinths each hiding a new piece of Pirate Gear - Flintlock Pistol, Pirate Hat, Scimitar, Risky's Boots, and even a Cannon. Upgrade Shantae's hair and weapons or unlock advanced Fighter's Moves. Locate maps, return lost Heart Squids, collect rare loot, and laugh out loud at the weird, wild, and wonderfully humorous cast of characters. Incredible stereoscopic visuals, unlockable Pirate-Mode, multiple endings, and an unforgettable soundtrack make this one game you won't want to miss!

title: Final Fantasy V
description:
The original Final Fantasy V comes to life with completely new graphics and audio as a 2D pixel remaster! A remodeled take on the fifth game in the world-renowned Final Fantasy series! Enjoy the timeless story told through charming retro graphics.

Final Fantasy V begins on a day when the world's wind currents begin to slow and stale. Deeply troubled by this occurrence, the king of Tycoon makes ready to travel to the Wind Shrine on the back of his drake, quelling the worries of his daughter, Princess Lenna. Upon arriving at the Shrine, the king bears witness to the Wind Crystal shattering before his eyes.

Meanwhile, a young traveler named Bartz, resting in the woods near Tycoon, witnesses a meteorite plunge to the planet's surface just outside the castle. Bartz promptly investigates, discovering Lenna lying unconscious from attack. After rescuing her, they discover an old man in the debris with partial amnesia named Galuf. Lenna explains that she had been on her way to the Wind Shrine after her father. Galuf suddenly recalls that it was his original destination as well, opting to accompany her. Though the trio part ways, Bartz soon encounters Lenna and Galuf again assaulted by monsters in a quaking valley. The three travel together, finding all land routes blockaded by the upheavals caused by the meteorite's fall. Exploring a cavern, they encounter a den of pirates and their leader, Faris. With the help of the pirate captain, the group makes its way to the Wind Shrine to discover the shattered Crystal, but no sign of the missing king. The shards react to their presence, however, and an image of Tycoon appears, explaining to them that they must protect those Crystals that yet remain.

title: Final Fantasy VI
description:
The original Final Fantasy VI comes to life with completely new graphics and audio! A remodeled 2D take on the sixth game in the world-renowned Final Fantasy series! Enjoy the timeless story told through charming retro graphics.

In the town of Narshe, Terra participates in an Imperial mission to seize a powerful Esper encased in ice. Upon locating it, a magical reaction occurs between Terra and the Esper; as a result, the soldiers accompanying Terra are killed and Terra is knocked unconscious. Upon awakening, Terra is informed that the Empire had been using a device called a "slave crown" to control her actions. With the crown now removed, Terra cannot remember anything more than her name and her rare ability to use magic unaided. Terra is then introduced to an organization known as the "Returners", who she agrees to help in their revolution against the Empire. The Returners learn that Imperial soldiers, led by Kefka, are planning another attempt to seize the frozen Esper. After repelling Kefka's attack, Terra experiences another magical reaction with the frozen Esper; she transforms into a creature resembling an Esper and flies to another continent. Upon locating Terra, the party is confronted by an Esper named Ramuh, who informs the group that Terra may require the assistance of another Esper imprisoned in the Imperial capital city of Vector.

title: Resident Evil 0
description:
Be prepared to relive the first nightmare in Resident Evil 0, a remastered version of the popular prequel to the original Resident Evil game. This remastered version takes the fear-inducing atmosphere from the original 2002 release and transforms it with stunning new HD visuals, improved sound, widescreen support and an optional modernized control system and more. It’s the best way to experience the story of what really happened before the iconic mansion incident that was the catalyst for the entire Resident Evil saga.
 
 The story of Resident Evil 0 takes players back to 1998. Reports have been mounting about unusual murders on the outskirts of Raccoon City. The city’s Special Forces division, S.T.A.R.S., sends their Bravo Team - including rookie cop member Rebecca Chambers - to investigate. On route, the team’s helicopter suffers engine trouble and is forced to make a crash landing, where they find an overturned prisoner transport vehicle. Splitting up to search the area, Rebecca discovers the Ecliptic Express, a train stopped dead on the tracks. Inside, she meets death row convict and ex-Navy lieutenant Billy Coen. Throughout the game, you will take control of both Rebecca and Billy, at times switching between both characters in order to proceed. Learning the advantages of each character is the key to solving puzzles and surviving the nightmares that lie ahead. Features    Return to the series origins  – Discover the truth behind what led to the horrors at the Mansion in Resident Evil in this fan-favorite and popular prequel title to the series.
    Completely enhanced visuals  – New high-resolution textures have been created from scratch, including 1080p support on next-gen consoles, while still preserving the classic appearance of the original release.
    Fully remastered sound effects  – 5.1 surround support provides a more experiential gaming atmosphere that best matches players’ listening environments.
   Experience the horror in the classic 4:3 ratio or newly added 16:9 widescreen mode.
   Play with the classic control scheme, or enjoy a new alternative scheme where the character moves in the direction of an analogue stick.
    Fan-favorite Resident Evil characters  – Rookie S.T.A.R.S. member Rebecca Chambers and wanted criminal Billy Coen combine skills and buddy up to survive the undead and infected nightmares that await them.
    Wesker Mode  - After completing the main storyline, you will be able to take control of series antagonist Albert Wesker, and use his superhuman abilities to power through the missions.

Resident Evil 0 揭示促使整个Resident Evil系列发生的事件－－Mansion Incident背后的真相。这个重制版维持了故事及游戏的原本性外，同时加入优化了的HD画面、5.1环回立体声道、可选择之现代化控制以及宽屏电视兼容性。准备好去发现潜伏在恶魔起源的恐怖秘密吧！
Resident Evil 0 揭示促使整個Resident Evil系列發生的事件－－Mansion Incident背後的真相。這個重製版維持了故事及遊戲的原本性外，同時加入優化了的HD畫面、5.1環迴立體聲道、可選擇之現代化控制以及寬屏電視兼容性。準備好去發現潛伏在惡魔起源的恐怖秘密吧！

Resident Evil 0 revela el misterio que se oculta tras el incidente en la mansión, evento que pone en marcha todos los sucesos de la serie de Resident Evil. Esta versión remasterizada presenta la historia y el juego originales con gráficos asombrosos de calidad HD, sonido envolvente de 5.1 canales, controles opcionales modernizados y compatibilidad con TV de pantalla ancha. Prepárate para descubrir los terribles secretos que se ocultan en el origen del mal.

Resident Evil 0 lève le voile sur la vérité cachée derrière l'Incident du manoir, le facteur déclencheur de tous les événements survenus dans la série Resident Evil. Cette version remastérisée reprend le scénario et le gameplay de l'opus original auxquels viennent s'ajouter des graphismes HD, une bande-son 5.1 multicanal, des commandes modernisées optionnelles et la compatibilité avec le format écran large. Préparez-vous à découvrir les terribles secrets tapis dans les origines du mal.

Resident Evil 0 enthüllt, was hinter dem Villen-Zwischenfall steckt, dem Auslöser der gesamten Handlung der Resident-Evil-Serie. Diese Remastered-Version bietet die Story und das Gameplay des Originals und wartet zusätzlich mit atemberaubender HD-Grafik, 5.1-Surround-Sound, optionaler modernisierter Steuerung und Breitbild-TV-Kompatibilität auf. Mach dich bereit, die grausamen Geheimnisse zu enthüllen, die die Ursprünge des Bösen bergen.

Resident Evil 0 revela a verdade por trás do Incidente da Mansão, que desencadeou todo o enredo da série Resident Evil. Esta versão remasterizada acrescenta à história e à jogabilidade originais gráficos HD espantosos, som surround de 5.1 canais, controlos opcionais modernizados e compatibilidade com TV de ecrã panorâmico. Prepara-te para descobrir os segredos terríveis escondidos nas origens do mal.

シリーズ累計販売本数6,500万本を超えるサバイバルホラーの代名詞『バイオハザード』シリーズ。
 
その出発点である「洋館事件」の始まりが描かれた作品、それこそが「biohazard 0」である。
 
ストーリーや、後のシリーズ作品にも大きな影響を与えたゲームシステムはそのままに、精緻なグラフィック、サウンド、操作性などを現在の技術でHDリマスター化。
 
秘められた恐怖と謎を、あなた自身で体験してもらいたい。

title: Norco
description:
Norco is a Southern Gothic point & click narrative adventure that immerses the player in the sinking suburbs and verdant industrial swamps of a distorted South Louisiana. Your brother Blake has gone missing in the aftermath of your mother's death. In the hopes of finding him, you must follow a fugitive security android through the refineries, strip malls, and drainage ditches of suburban New Orleans.

Explore a world of detail-rich and atmospheric pixel art born from the petrochemical landscapes of South Louisiana. Navigate your way through a world of uncertainty and moral ambiguity as you venture deeper into the swamp to unravel the threads left by your brother. Fight, sneak, or fast-talk your way past any hometown bullies, security contractors, or death cults that stand in your way. Bust into a refinery with your robot friends. Immerse yourself in the eclectic, atmospheric soundscapes of Gewgawly I. Explore vast scenic landscapes of pulsing nightlife and eerie solitude. Recruit a wild-eyed river dog.

title: Resident Evil
description:
The game that defined the survival-horror genre is back! Check out the remastered HD version of Resident Evil.
 
 In 1998 a special forces team is sent to investigate some bizarre murders on the outskirts of Raccoon City. Upon arriving they are attacked by a pack of blood-thirsty dogs and are forced to take cover in a nearby mansion. But the scent of death hangs heavy in the air. Supplies are scarce as they struggle to stay alive.
 
  Graphics 
   More detailed graphics that retain the horror.
   The environments come alive with detail thanks to resolution upgrades and non-static 3D models.
   Post-processing effects like Bloom filters, which were not easy to do at the time of the original release, have been added to make the HD graphics even more realistic.
   High-Resolution Environments - We've increased the resolution of the background environments by recreating them with a mix of high-res static images, plus animated 3D models.  
  Widescreen Support 
   Widescreen (16:9) is supported, so players can experience a greater sense of immersion.
   In widescreen mode, the screen will scroll. The parts of the screen that get cut off on the top and bottom will scroll into view automatically depending on the character's position.
   You can switch the display mode during gameplay in real time.  
  Sound & New Controls 
   High-Quality Sound - The audio has been remastered to increase the sampling rate, and of course 5.1ch output is also now supported.
   New Controls
   You can play using the original control scheme or an alternate control scheme that lets you just push the analog stick to move in the direction you want to go.
   You can switch the control scheme during gameplay in real time.

生存恐怖类型的游戏回归！这是重新制作的高清版Resident Evil。
 
 在1998年一支特种部队被派去Raccoon City效区调查离奇的杀人事件，他们抵达后受到嗜血的狗袭击，被迫走到附近的豪宅。但是死亡的气味笼罩当中，在没有支持下努力求存。
 
  图像 
   在更精致的图像下保留着恐怖感。
   提升显示解像度和非静态3D模块，令环境变得更具活力。
   画面后期制作如Bloom filters并不容易在原来的版本使用，为了制作高清的图像，令画面更加逼真，所以加入这个效果。
   高解像度环保-我们混合高解像的静态图像和3D动画模块重新制作，增加背景环境的解像度。  
  支援宽屏幕  
    支援(16:9) 宽屏幕，所以玩家可以增加更大的投入感。
   在宽屏幕模式下，画面自动卷轴表示，因应角色的位置，而在最顶和最底部份而自动卷轴。
   你可以在游戏过程中随时切换显示模式。  
  音效&新操控方式  
   高质量声音 – 音频已重新制作以提高质量的声音，当然也支持5.1声道输出。
   新操控方式
   你可以使用原来的操控方式或使用备用操控方式来进行游戏，只需按下Analog Stick就可以朝你想的方向移动。
   你可以在游戏过程中随时切换操控方式。

生存恐怖類型的遊戲回歸！這是重新製作的高清版Resident Evil。
 
 在1998年一支特種部隊被派去Raccoon City郊區調查離奇的殺人事件，他們抵達後受到嗜血的狗襲擊，被迫走到附近的豪宅。但是死亡的氣味籠罩當中，在沒有支援下努力求存。
 
  圖像 
   在更精緻的圖像下保留著恐怖感。
   提升顯示解像度和非靜態3D模組，令環境變得更具活力。
   畫面後期製作如Bloom filters並不容易在原來的版本使用，為了製作高清的圖像，令畫面更加逼真而新增這個效果。
   高解像度環保-我們混合高解像的靜態圖像和3D動畫模組重新製作，增加背景環境的解像度。  
  支援寬屏幕  
    支援(16:9) 寬屏幕，所以玩家可以增加更大的投入感。
   在寬屏幕模式下，畫面自動卷軸表示，因應角色的位置，而在最頂和最底部份而自動卷軸。
   你可以在遊戲過程中隨時切換顯示模式。  
  音效&新操控方式  
   高質量聲音 – 音頻已重新製作以提高質量的聲音，當然也支援5.1聲道輸出。
   新操控方式
   你可以使用原來的操控方式或使用備用操控方式來進行遊戲，只需按下Analog Stick就可以朝你想的方向移動。
   你可以在遊戲過程中隨時切換操控方式。

Es el año 1998. Un grupo de fuerzas especiales es destinado a las afueras de Raccoon City para investigar una serie de extraños asesinatos. A su llegada, una jauría de perros sedientos de sangre ataca al grupo, obligándoles a refugiarse en una mansión cercana. La muerte acecha en cada esquina y escasean los suministros. Aquí comienza la lucha por la supervivencia.
 
 La versión remasterizada en HD del "remake" de Resident Evil. Revive el juego que definió el "Survival Horror".
 
  Gráficos 
   Gráficos más detallados, fieles al terror del juego original.
   Los escenarios cobran vida con gran detalle gracias a las mejoras en resolución y a los modelos 3D no estáticos.
   Efectos de post-procesado, como por ejemplo los filtros de "bloom", que cuando el juego salió por primera vez eran muy difíciles de realizar, han sido añadidos a esta versión para conseguir gráficos 3D más reales.
   Escenarios en alta resolución - Trabajando los escenarios con una mezcla de imágenes en alta resolución y modelos animados en 3D, hemos podido incrementar también la resolución de los fondos.    
  Compatibilidad con pantalla ancha 
   El formato en pantalla ancha (16:9) es compatible, por lo que ahora los jugadores pueden experimentar una mayor sensación de inmersión.
   Puedes jugar en el formato original 4:3 o en formato de pantalla ancha 16:9. Las cinemáticas también son compatibles con el nuevo formato. En el modo pantalla ancha, las partes que queden cortadas en la parte superior e inferior de la pantalla se desplazarán automáticamente para que sean visibles dependiendo de la posición del personaje.
   Puedes cambiar el formato en tiempo real durante la partida.  
  Sonido y controles nuevos 
   Sonido de alta calidad - El sonido ha sido remasterizado para incrementar la tasa de sampleado, y por supuesto, ahora el sistema 5.1 es compatible con el juego. 
   Controles nuevos 
   Puedes jugar usando los controles originales o un esquema de control alternativo que te permite mover el stick analógico para moverte en la dirección deseada.
   Puedes cambiar el esquema de control en cualquier momento durante la partida en tiempo real.

En 1998, des forces spéciales sont envoyées à Raccoon City pour enquêter sur une série de meurtres étranges. À leur arrivée, les agents sont attaqués par une meute de chiens. Ils ont fait la plus grande erreur de leur vie en se réfugiant dans un manoir. La nuit qui commence s'inscrira comme la plus effroyable de leur existence !
 
 Cette version remasterisée ressuscite le titre original d'une série qui s'est imposée en référence du genre survival-horror.
 
  Graphiques 
   Des graphismes retravaillés pour un résultat encore plus effrayant !
   Grâce à la haute résolution et aux modèles 3D non statiques, les environnements sont devenus plus réalistes que jamais.
   Les effets de post-traitement comme le filtre de Bloom, qui était complexe à utiliser à l'époque du jeu original, ont été ajoutés pour rendre les graphismes HD encore plus réalistes.
   Environnements haute résolution - Nous avons peaufiné les décors dans les moindres détails en recréant tous les environnements à l'aide d'images fixes haute résolution associées à des modèles 3D.  
  Compatibilité écran large 
   Le format large 16:9 est compatible, pour que les joueurs puissent expérimenter une sensation d'immersion totale.
   En mode écran large, l'écran de jeu défile. Les parties de l'écran qui sont coupées en haut et en bas défileront automatiquement selon le déplacement des personnages.
   Vous pouvez changer le type d'affichage durant le jeu en temps réel.  
  Sons et commandes 
   Son haute qualité - L'audio a été remasterisé pour augmenter la fréquence d'échantillonnage. Le format multicanal 5.1ch est également compatible.
   Commandes améliorées
   Vous pouvez jouer en utilisant la configuration d'origine ou une configuration "remake" utilisant le joystick pour se déplacer.
   Vous pouvez changer le type de configuration durant le jeu en temps réel.

1998. Spezialeinheiten wurden entsandt, um mysteriöse Mordfälle außerhalb von Raccoon City zu untersuchen. Nach ihrer Ankunft werden sie von blutdürstigen Hunden angegriffen und müssen Flucht in einer Villa suchen, aber der Geruch des Todes liegt in der Luft. Mit knappen Vorräten kämpfen sie fortan um ihr Überleben.
 
 Erfahren Sie in dieser überarbeiteten HD-Version des Resident Evil-Remakes erneut das Spiel, mit dem alles begann. Der original Survival-Horror - Jetzt detaillierter als je zuvor!
 
  Grafik 
   Detailliertere Grafik, die den Horror des originalen Spiels bewahrt.
   Durch eine erhöhte Auflösung und der Ersetzung bewegbarer Objekte durch 3D-Modelle wird den Umgebungen leben eingehaucht.
   Nachbearbeitungseffekte wie Bloom-Shader, die im originalen Spiel technisch nicht machbar waren, lassen die HD-Grafik noch realistischer aussehen.
   Hochauflösende Umgebungen - Wir haben die Auflösung der Umgebungen erhöht, indem wir sie mit einer Mischung aus hochauflösenden statischen Bildern plus animierten 3D-Modellen nachgebildet haben.  
  Breitbild-Unterstützung 
   Die neue Breitbild-Unterstützung (16:9) sorgt für ein intensiveres Spielerlebnis.
   Sie können im original 4:3-Bildverhältnis oder im 16:9-Breitbildformat spielen. Auch die CG-Filmzwischensequenzen unterstützen jetzt das Breitbildverhältnis. Im Breitbild-Modus scrollt der Bildschirm. Der Teil der Szene, der oben oder unten abgeschnitten ist, wird automatisch je nach der Position des Charakters ins Bild bewegt.
   Sie können den Anzeige-Modus während des Spiels in Echtzeit umschalten.  
  Sound & Neue Steuerung 
   Hochqualitativer Sound - Im Zuge eines Remastering wurde die Abtastrate erhöht und selbstverständlich unterstützt der Sound jetzt 5.1-Kanal-Ausgabe.
   Neue Steuerung
   Sie können mit dem original Steuerungsschema spielen oder ein überarbeitetes Steuerungsschema benutzen, bei dem Sie die Spielfigur mit dem Analogstick in die gewünschte Richtung bewegen.
   Sie können das Steuerungsschema während des Spiels in Echtzeit umschalten.

The game that defined the survival-horror genre is back! Check out the remastered HD version of Resident Evil.
 
 In 1998 a special forces team is sent to investigate some bizarre murders on the outskirts of Raccoon City. Upon arriving they are attacked by a pack of blood-thirsty dogs and are forced to take cover in a nearby mansion. But the scent of death hangs heavy in the air. Supplies are scarce as they struggle to stay alive.
 
  Graphics 
   More detailed graphics that retain the horror.
   The environments come alive with detail thanks to resolution upgrades and non-static 3D models.
   Post-processing effects like Bloom filters, which were not easy to do at the time of the original release, have been added to make the HD graphics even more realistic.
   High-Resolution Environments - We've increased the resolution of the background environments by recreating them with a mix of high-res static images, plus animated 3D models.  
  Widescreen Support 
   Widescreen (16:9) is supported, so players can experience a greater sense of immersion.
   In widescreen mode, the screen will scroll. The parts of the screen that get cut off on the top and bottom will scroll into view automatically depending on the character's position.
   You can switch the display mode during gameplay in real time.  
  Sound & New Controls 
   High-Quality Sound - The audio has been remastered to increase the sampling rate, and of course 5.1ch output is also now supported.
   New Controls
   You can play using the original control scheme or an alternate control scheme that lets you just push the analog stick to move in the direction you want to go.
   You can switch the control scheme during gameplay in real time.

1998年
 ラクーンシティ郊外で多発する猟奇殺人事件。
 事件捜査中に消息を絶った「S.T.A.R.S.」ブラヴォーチーム。
 その捜索に赴いたクリス達アルファチームに異形の群れが襲いかかる。
 仲間を失いつつも、かろうじて洋館に駆け込むクリス達。
 彼らは生きて此処から脱出することが出来るのだろうか…
 
 逃げ場の無い閉ざされた空間、不条理に襲い来る異形、
 絶望的な状況から知恵と限られた資源を利用し生き延びろ！
 
 全ての原点である第１作『バイオハザード』のリメイク版『biohazard』が、待望のHDリマスター化。
 原作の”圧倒的な恐怖”はそのままに、より精細に、かつ臨場感の増した体験がココに！
 
  グラフィックHD化 
   原作の恐怖はそのままに、より精細になったグラフィック
   最新の高解像度化技術と動きのある設置物の３Ｄモデル化により、高精細化された背景やキャラクター。
   さらに原作発表当時では実現が難しかったブルーム効果などのポストエフェクトにより、恐ろしくも緻密なグラフィックをHD画質で再構成。
   “動画背景”も高解像度化  
  ワイド画面対応 
   ワイド画面（16：9）へ対応し、より臨場感のある体験が出来る
   さらに、ワイド画面表示中は「画面スクロール機能」を搭載。 表示しきれない背景部分は、プレイヤーの移動に合わせて上下にスクロールする。
   オリジナル画面表示とワイド画面表示はゲームプレイ中にリアルタイムに変更ができます  
  サウンド＆新操作 
   高音質なサウンド
   音声もサンプリングレートをアップし、リマスタリング。 もちろん5.1ｃｈでの出力にも対応している。  
  新たな操作方法 
   原作と同じ感覚でプレイできるオリジナル操作はそのままに、アナログスティックを倒した方向へ直感的に移動することが出来るアレンジ操作も選択可能になった。
   プレイヤーの操作方法はゲームプレイ中にリアルタイムに変更ができます

È il 1998 e le forze speciali vengono inviate a investigare le bizzarre uccisioni nei pressi di Raccoon City. Al loro arrivo vengono attaccati da un branco di cani assetati di sangue e sono costretti a rifugiarsi in una villa nelle vicinanze. Ma la morte in agguato e le scarse risorse rendendo ardua la lotta per la sopravvivenza.
 
 La versione in alta definizione del remake di Resident Evil riporta in auge il gioco che ha dato inizio alla serie che ha venduto più di 61 milioni di copie globali.
 
  Grafica 
   Grafica migliorata per un terrore in HD!
   Le ambientazioni prendono vita con dettagli mai visti prima grazie all'aumento di risoluzione e ai modelli 3D dinamici.
   Effetti aggiunti in post produzione, quali filtri bloom, troppo complessi per la versione originale, sono stati aggiunti per rendere la grafica ancora più realistica.
   Ambienti in alta definizione - Fondali migliorati con un mix di immagini statiche e modelli 3D animati hanno reso possibile ottenere ambientazioni ancora più dettagliate con una risoluzione ancora più elevata.  
  Supporto widescreen 
   Il formato widescreen (16:9) è supportato, così che i giocatori possano provare un maggiore senso di coinvolgimento.
   Oltre al formato in 16:9 è anche possibile giocare nel formato classico in 4:3. Anche i filmati in CG supportano il nuovo formato widescreen.
   In modalità widescreen la visuale si muoverà leggermente per mostrare le parti tagliate in basso e alto dello schermo a seconda della posizione del personaggio.
   È possibile cambiare in tempo reale tra i due formati durante una partita.  
  Audio e nuovi comandi 
   Audio di alta qualità - Il comparto audio è stato rimasterizzato per aumentare la frequenza di campionamento ed è stata aggiunta l'uscita surround 5.1.
   Nuovi comandi
   È possibile giocare con il sistema di controllo originale o con un sistema alternativo che permette di utilizzare la levetta analogica per muoversi nella direzione desiderata.
   È possibile cambiare sistema in tempo reale.

title: Dispatch
description:
Dispatch is a superhero workplace comedy where choices matter. Manage a dysfunctional team of misfit heroes and strategize who to send to emergencies around the city, all while balancing office politics, personal relationships, and your own quest to become a hero.

In a world filled with superheroes, Robert Robertson, an ordinary human, pilots a giant robotic suit as Meca Man, carrying on his father's legacy. When his suit is irreversibly damaged in a battle against his archnemesis and father's killer, Shroud, he's forced into retirement. Soon after, the Superhero Dispatch Network (SDN) makes him an offer: they’ll repair his suit if he agrees to lead and coordinate the Z-Team, a group of former supervillains seeking redemption, as they rush across Los Angeles to save the day. But every mission comes with choices: the kind that define what makes someone a hero, with or without superpowers.

title: Metal Gear Solid
description:
Metal Gear Solid is a stealth game created by Hideo Kojima which follows the MSX2 video games Metal Gear and Metal Gear 2: Solid Snake. Despite a transition to 3D, Metal Gear Solid's gameplay remains similar to his predecessors. The game utilizes a traditional top-down view and the player must navigate the protagonist Solid Snake through the game's areas without being detected. Detection will set off an alarm which draws armed enemies to his location. Conversations with Snake's allies and cutscenes are used extensively to advance the plot and gain more insight into it. Metal Gear Solid is regarded as one of the greatest and most important video games of all time, and helped popularize the stealth genre and in-engine cinematic cutscenes.

Metal Gear Solid takes place in an alternate history in which the Cold War continued into the 1990s, ending at some point near the end of the 20th century. Coming out of retirement, special agent Solid Snake is called back into the line of duty to take on rogue members of Foxhound, a crack government anti-terrorist squad threatening to launch nuclear-weapons on the White House unless they receive their $1 billion ransom. With only 24 hours to sabotage Foxhound's threat, Snake must infiltrate enemy lines, rescue the two hostages and thwart the terrorists' plans. The demons of his past will challenge him and his will as a soldier shall be tested, as Snake fights to save the world from nuclear devastation.

localized_title.text: 合金装备索利德 Metal Gear Solid

localized_description.text:
Metal Gear Solid is a stealth game created by Hideo Kojima which follows the MSX2 video games Metal Gear and Metal Gear 2: Solid Snake. Despite a transition to 3D, Metal Gear Solid's gameplay remains similar to his predecessors. The game utilizes a traditional top-down view and the player must navigate the protagonist Solid Snake through the game's areas without being detected. Detection will set off an alarm which draws armed enemies to his location. Conversations with Snake's allies and cutscenes are used extensively to advance the plot and gain more insight into it. Metal Gear Solid is regarded as one of the greatest and most important video games of all time, and helped popularize the stealth genre and in-engine cinematic cutscenes.

Metal Gear Solid takes place in an alternate history in which the Cold War continued into the 1990s, ending at some point near the end of the 20th century. Coming out of retirement, special agent Solid Snake is called back into the line of duty to take on rogue members of Foxhound, a crack government anti-terrorist squad threatening to launch nuclear-weapons on the White House unless they receive their $1 billion ransom. With only 24 hours to sabotage Foxhound's threat, Snake must infiltrate enemy lines, rescue the two hostages and thwart the terrorists' plans. The demons of his past will challenge him and his will as a soldier shall be tested, as Snake fights to save the world from nuclear devastation.

潜龙谍影系列（英文：Metal Gear Solid、日文：メタルギアソリッド，中国大陆旧译“合金装备”，台湾与香港旧译“燃烧坦克”或“燃烧战车”，台湾于PS时期则改译为“特攻神谍”），由日本科乐美（KONAMI）公司发行、小岛制作室（KOJIMA PRODUCTION）的小岛秀夫主导开发的战术类动作游戏系列及相关产物。
小岛秀夫最初由小时候的捉迷藏游戏中得出灵感，打算制作一个类似电影《第三集中营》的游戏，并最后确定潜龙谍影的游戏模式。

title: Guild Wars: Collector's Edition
description:
In a world torn by conflict, where human kingdoms are all but destroyed and guilds sacrifice all for a chance to control the Hall of Heroes, a champion must rise from the ruins of a once-proud land to lead refugees from the ashes and fulfill an ancient prophecy. Will that hero be you?

The Guild Wars Collector's Edition box includes:
- Exclusive in-game Divine Aura for your characters
- Logitech Internet Chat Headset
- Teamspeak Software (custom version)
- Artbook "The Art of Guild Wars" with 128 Pages
- Guild Wars Soundtrack CD

Across Tyria, the human kingdoms are under attack by the vicious Charr. As a young hero caught between the powerful will of King Adelbern and the rebellious Prince Rurik, you are called upon to defend humanity. Will you become an instrument of the ancient prophecy or be crushed beneath it? Rally your strength and the power of your guild to establish your legend.

Across Tyria, the human kingdoms are under attack by the vicious Charr. As a young hero caught between the powerful will of King Adelbern and the rebellious Prince Rurik, you are called upon to defend humanity. Will you become an instrument of the ancient prophecy or be crushed beneath it? Rally your strength and the power of your guild to establish your legend.

brief:
In a world torn by conflict, where human kingdoms are all but destroyed and guilds sacrifice all for a chance to control the Hall of Heroes, a champion must rise from the ruins of a once-proud land to lead refugees from the ashes and fulfill an ancient prophecy. Will that hero be you?

The Guild Wars Collector's Edition box includes:
- Exclusive in-game Divine Aura for your characters
- Logitech Internet Chat Headset
- Teamspeak Software (custom version)
- Artbook "The Art of Guild Wars" with 128 Pages
- Guild Wars Soundtrack CD

Across Tyria, the human kingdoms are under attack by the vicious Charr. As a young hero caught between the powerful will of King Adelbern and the rebellious Prince Rurik, you are called upon to defend humanity. Will you become an instrument of the ancient prophecy or be crushed beneath it? Rally your strength and the power of your guild to establish your legend.

title: The Legend of Zelda: Twilight Princess
description:
The Legend of Zelda: Twilight Princess was initially developed with the Nintendo GameCube in mind, but ended up receiving a Wii port when it was released to promote the new console. This version has motion control compatibility for the sword and pointer controls for the menus, the bow and the boomerang. This version of the game has a completely inverted map and locations when comparing with the GameCube release. The change in layout was meant to adapt Link's usually left-handed design to right-handed people, given the motion controls.

Link, a young farm boy whose tasks consist of herding goats to watching children in Ordon village, is asked by the mayor to run an errand in Castle Town. But things went strange that day: the land becomes dark and strange creatures appear from another world called the Twilight Realm which turns most people into ghosts. Unlike the others, Link transforms into a wolf but is captured. A mysterious figure named Midna helps him break free, and with the aid of her magic, they set off to free the land from the shadows. Link must explore the vast land of Hyrule and uncover the mystery behind its plunge into darkness.

title: Chants of Sennaar
description:
UPCOMING GAME FROM FOCUS ENTERTAINMENT   https://store.steampowered.com/app/1672810?utm_source=homepage&utm_campaign=widget_chants 
 
  About the Game  
 
  
 Winner of Best Indie Game at the 2024 New York Game Awards and nominated multiple times at other ceremonies including The Game Awards and the BAFTA, Chants of Sennaar is a critically-acclaimed puzzle and adventure game developed by Rundisc.
 
 Divided since the dawn of time, the Peoples of the Tower no longer speak to each other, isolated by fear or mistrust. It is said that one day, a Traveler will find the wisdom to break down the walls and restore the balance. Travel the endless steps of a prodigious labyrinth, uncover the truth and unveil the mysteries of this fascinating universe where ancient languages are both the lock and the key.
 
  
  
 Inspired by the myth of Babel, discover an enigmatic and vast tower. As the Traveler, delve into a world full of mysteries, where Peoples have grown distant, unable to communicate with each other anymore. Begin your adventure in a prodigious tower inhabited by five distinct Peoples, observe, listen, and strive to mend the bonds of distrust. 
 
  
  
 With a smart gameplay system, explore and solve various puzzles to uncover the mysteries of five different interconnected languages. Always guided by your trusty notebook, note each symbol, keep track of your surroundings, engage in conversations with people and unravel the meaning of every glyph. Each step will pave your way to the top of the Tower as each word will restore the link between People.
 
  
  
 Dive into an enthralling and colorful world full of secrets. Tumble headlong into a beautiful world inspired by impactful European comics authors where every floor of the Tower possesses its own visual identity, supported by distinctive technological levels, architecture and culture. Embark on a poetic and enchanting journey driven by a soul-stirring, lyrical soundtrack, made by Thomas Brunet.
 
  https://store.steampowered.com/app/1931770/Chants_of_Sennaar/

UPCOMING GAME FROM FOCUS ENTERTAINMENT   https://store.steampowered.com/app/1672810?utm_source=homepage&utm_campaign=widget_chants 
 
  Acerca del juego  
 
  
 Chants of Sennaar es un juego de aventuras y puzles desarrollado por Rundisc y distribuido por Focus Entertainment. Ha recibido grandes elogios por parte de la crítica y el premio al Mejor Juego Independiente en los New York Game Awards 2024, además de diversas nominaciones a otros premios como los BAFTA y The Game Awards.
 
 Divididos desde el albor de los tiempos, aislados por miedo o desconfianza, los pueblos de la torre ya no se hablan. Mas cuenta la leyenda que un viajero sabrá derribar los muros y recuperar el equilibrio. Recorre los infinitos caminos de un laberinto prodigioso, averigua la verdad y desvela los misterios de este universo fascinante en el que antiguos idiomas son tanto puerta como llave.
 
  
  
 Descubre una enorme y enigmática torre inspirada en el mito de Babel. Encarna al viajero y sumérgete en un mundo lleno de misterios donde las gentes se han distanciado y ya no son capaces de comunicarse entre ellas. Empieza la aventura en una torre prodigiosa habitada por cinco pueblos diferentes, observa, escucha e intenta rehacer los vínculos que ha roto la desconfianza.
 
  
  
 Disfruta de un ingenioso sistema de juego, explora y resuelve puzles para revelar los secretos de cinco idiomas distintos pero relacionados. Con la ayuda de tu fiel cuaderno, toma nota de cada símbolo, lleva un registro del entorno, habla con la gente y desentraña el significado de los glifos. Cada paso será un peldaño en el ascenso a la torre y cada palabra un eslabón en los vínculos entre las gentes.
 
  
  
 Sumérgete en un lugar colorido y cautivador lleno de secretos. Lánzate a un mundo hermoso inspirado por prestigiosos autores de cómic europeos en el que cada nivel de la torre cuenta con una identidad visual propia y una tecnología, arquitectura y cultura características. Emprende un viaje apasionante y poético con una banda sonora lírica y conmovedora compuesta por Thomas Brunet.
 
  https://store.steampowered.com/app/1931770/Chants_of_Sennaar/

UPCOMING GAME FROM FOCUS ENTERTAINMENT   https://store.steampowered.com/app/1672810?utm_source=homepage&utm_campaign=widget_chants 
 
  À propos du jeu  
 
  
 Nommé meilleur jeu indépendant aux New York Game Awards 2024 et nominé à de nombreuses reprises lors d'autres événements (notamment The Game Awards et les BAFTA), Chants of Sennaar est un jeu d'aventure à énigmes salué par la critique. Il est développé par Rundisc.
 
 Divisés depuis la nuit des temps, isolés par la peur ou la méfiance, les Peuples de la Tour ne se parlent plus. On dit qu'un jour, un voyageur d'une grande sagesse brisera ces murs de défiance et rétablira l'équilibre. Grimpez les escaliers interminables d'un extraordinaire labyrinthe, découvrez la vérité et levez le voile sur les mystères de cet univers fascinant où les langues anciennes constituent à la fois des obstacles et des solutions. 
 
  
  
 Découvrez une tour aussi imposante qu'énigmatique dans ce jeu qui s'inspire du mythe de la Tour de Babel. Dans le rôle du Voyageur, plongez dans un monde de mystères où les peuples se sont éloignés les uns avec les autres, au point de ne plus pouvoir communiquer entre eux. Commencez l'aventure dans cette tour prodigieuse habitée par cinq peuplades très différentes. Observez, écoutez et faites tout votre possible pour rétablir la confiance d'autrefois.
 
  
  
 Avec son gameplay astucieux, le jeu vous permettra d'explorer les lieux et de résoudre diverses énigmes pour élucider les mystères de cinq langues à la fois distinctes et liées les unes aux autres. Prenez des notes sur les symboles et l'environnement dans votre fidèle carnet, engagez la conversation avec différentes personnes et découvrez la signification de tous les glyphes. À chaque pas qui vous rapprochera du sommet de la tour, les mots vous permettront de rétablir les liens entre les peuples.
 
  
  
 Plongez-vous dans un monde haut en couleur regorgeant de secrets. Explorez des environnements sublimes qui s'inspirent de bandes dessinées européennes, chaque étage de la tour ayant une identité visuelle, un niveau technologique, une architecture et une culture qui lui sont propres. Embarquez-vous dans un voyage poétique et enchanteur au son d'une bande originale lyrique et émouvante composée par Thomas Brunet.
 
  https://store.steampowered.com/app/1931770/Chants_of_Sennaar/

UPCOMING GAME FROM FOCUS ENTERTAINMENT   https://store.steampowered.com/app/1672810?utm_source=homepage&utm_campaign=widget_chants 
 
  Über das Spiel  
 
  
 Das bei den New York Game Awards 2024 als bestes Indie-Spiel ausgezeichnete und bei anderen Preisverleihungen wie The Game Awards und BAFTA mehrfach nominierte Chants of Sennaar ist ein von der Kritik hochgelobtes Rätsel- und Abenteuerspiel, das von Rundisc entwickelt wurde.
 
 Die seit Anbeginn der Zeit durch Angst und Misstrauen voneinander isolierten Völker des Turms kommunizieren nicht mehr miteinander. Es heißt, dass eines Tages ein Reisender die Weisheit finden wird, die Mauern niederzureißen und das Gleichgewicht wiederherzustellen. Erklimme die endlosen Stufen eines gewaltigen Labyrinths, entdecke die Wahrheit und lüfte die Geheimnisse dieses faszinierenden Universums, in dem die uralten Sprachen Schlüssel und Schloss zugleich sind.
 
  
  
 Erkunde einen gewaltigen vom Mythos von Babel inspirierten Turm voller Rätsel. Als Reisender tauchst du in eine geheimnisvolle Welt ein, in der sich die Völker immer weiter voneinander entfernt haben und nicht mehr in der Lage sind, sich zu verständigen. Beginne dein Abenteuer in einem riesigen Turm, der von fünf verschiedenen Völkern bewohnt wird. Beobachte, lausche und versuche, die vom Misstrauen zerrissenen Bande wiederherzustellen.
 
  
  
 Erkunde den Turm und löse unterschiedliche Rätsel mithilfe eines intelligenten Spielsystems, um die Geheimnisse fünf miteinander verbundener Sprachen zu lüften. Dein treuer Begleiter ist dabei das Notizbuch, in dem du jedes gefundene Symbol notierst. Behalte deine Umgebung im Auge, unterhalte dich mit den Bewohnern und entziffere die Bedeutung aller Glyphen. Mit jedem entschlüsselten Wort stellst du die Verbindung zwischen den Völkern wieder her und kommst der Spitze des Turms ein Stück näher.
 
  
  
 Eine mitreißende, farbenfrohe Welt voller Geheimnisse und Rätsel erwartet dich. Stürze dich kopfüber in eine wunderschöne Spielumgebung, die sich an einflussreichen europäischen Comics orientiert. Jede Ebene des Turms besitzt ihre eigene visuelle Identität, die sich in Form einzigartiger Technologien, Architektur und Kultur äußert. Begib dich auf ein zauberhaftes Abenteuer, das mit einem gefühlvollen lyrischen Soundtrack von Thomas Brunet unterlegt ist.
 
  https://store.steampowered.com/app/1931770/Chants_of_Sennaar/

UPCOMING GAME FROM FOCUS ENTERTAINMENT   https://store.steampowered.com/app/1672810?utm_source=homepage&utm_campaign=widget_chants 
 
  Informazioni sul gioco  
 
  
 Vincitore del premio Best Indie Game ai New York Game Awards del 2024 e plurinominato in altre premiazioni tra cui The Game Awards e i BAFTA, Chants of Sennaar è un gioco di avventura e rompicapi acclamato dalla critica, sviluppato da Rundisc.
 
 Separati fin dall'alba del tempo, i Popoli della Torre non comunicano più gli uni con gli altri, isolati dalla paura o dalla sfiducia. Si dice che un giorno verrà un Viaggiatore, e la sua saggezza abbatterà le barriere e ristabilirà l'equilibrio. Viaggia per le scalinate interminabili di un prodigioso labirinto, scopri la verità e svela i misteri di questo universo affascinante in cui le lingue antiche sono insieme chiave e serratura. 
 
  
  
 Scopri una torre enigmatica e vasta, ispirata al mito di Babele. Nei panni del Viaggiatore, esplora un mondo pieno di misteri, dove i Popoli si sono allontanati, ormai incapaci di comunicare tra loro. Inizia la tua avventura in una torre prodigiosa abitata da cinque diversi Popoli: osserva, ascolta e fai ogni sforzo per rinsaldare i legami spezzati dalla sfiducia.
 
  
  
 Grazie al sistema di gameplay intelligente, esplora e risolvi diversi enigmi per scoprire i misteri di cinque diverse lingue interconnesse tra loro. Sotto la guida costante del tuo fedele diario, annota ogni simbolo, tieni traccia dell'ambiente circostante, conversa con le persone e svela il significato di ciascun glifo. Ogni passo in avanti ti porterà verso la vetta della Torre, e ogni parola rinsalderà i legami tra i Popoli.
 
  
  
 Immergiti in un mondo appassionante e pittoresco, colmo di segreti. Tuffati in un mondo magnifico ispirato ai maestri del fumetto europeo dove ciascun piano della Torre ha una sua identità visiva, con tecnologie, architetture e culture ben distinte. Parti per un viaggio poetico e ammaliante accompagnato da una colonna sonora che risuona in fondo all'anima, realizzata da Thomas Brunet.
 
  https://store.steampowered.com/app/1931770/Chants_of_Sennaar/

title: Before Your Eyes
description:
A first person narrative adventure which tells the story of a soul’s journey into the afterlife using your real-life blinks.

The story begins after your death, aboard the ship of a mythical Ferryman tasked with shepherding souls to the afterlife. In order to help you pass on, he must first learn the story of your life. And so, he sends you back to relive your most important moments.
